calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Diane Papan, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Mary Fitzgerald and Michael Fitzgerald, are also present, were sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant: Latoya Covos as follows:
Damages $682,508.82
Costs $663.50, for a total of $683,172.32
Judgment signed in open court.
